meaning: adj.神圣的,圣洁的n.神圣的东西
examples: We bless your holy name, O Lord.
At the festival, candles are blessed and sprinkled with holy water.
These holy places and the nearby Neolithic sites are an incomparable testimony to prehistoric times.
After the week-long, at times draining, services of Holy Week, Rome is still up for a celebration.
